1.title: Share the Love
1.description: This lovely badge was earned by users who shared their favorite Twitch clips in February 2025.

1.title: Watching without audio
1.description: Individuals with unreliable or no sound can select this badge

1.title: Turbo
1.description: A subscriber of Twitch's monthly premium user service

message.body: "...three screen puzzle ever made" great timing to open the stream
6 raiders from TheBiob have joined!
gl easiest 3 screens ever
that's how it goes
pretty sure you do
oh this puzzle.
are we waiting for a specific rng seed?
secret code you enter on the title screen to unlock the harder version of this puzzle.
unlocks the challenge mode Kapp
what kind of stupid challenges can we add?
"you can only change inputs every other frame"
"actually beat the hack via the intended strat"
not sure what's worse TBH.
@dacin can you pause to change parity of when you can change inputs?
no, you can only pause every other frame.
unfortunate
ok but: scrolling
@Magikey47 fwiw I think I'm still missing at least 2 major things for the intended strat.
Just two
maybe it's just 3, one per screen
hfBERGE
evening o/, gl etsp
disassembly strim
You got this.
overslot is so cool
it was just the usual bot message
1594 is an address that shows up on the title screen
sprite's are processed after right?
hm, not sure
Dacin's sprite passable blocks set 48, for some reason
was about to say, maybe the custom block uses it
@Magikey47 they act as turning turn block so you can't eat them with a coin snake.
could've used dirt smh
i learned yesterday that pixi lets you make custom code for when a sprite is in yoshi's mouth. i just think that's cool
lol
never? that's kind of impressive
Hf doesn't have the best memories with custom sprites
oh no
fair
mhm
fair
speaking of, someone posted a sprite tool question in #help today and i found that amusing
uberasm just does that now
(unless you want a gamemode F8 gimmick in your vanilla hack)
my thing with custom sprites is they always have a lot of chocolate glitches which aren't that interesting
gamemode F8?
is F8 the one that jumps in the middle of the goal walk routine
Yes
i had to fix a custom sprite for a friend the other week because if you move it off screen it completely breaks
Old scrolling pipes were so goofy
I remember watching abuse and die and mario's drug trip and the author used their jank a lot
carryable pipe is still broken even in the version that's submitted on smwc
2-connected pipes, cannot be disconnected by deleting a single vertex.
I miss the old screen scrolling pipes. They were jank but in a very accidental way.
for my own hacks i limit the asm to stuff like standard custom blocks and visual effects
it's the same issue i have with baseroms where you just have zero idea what's inside it or how it breaks vanilla setups or conflicts with your patches
Baseroms are excellent if you want to make twitch kaizo
yeah they're good for what they're meant for
i have made a template rom for myself
i never actually use it and just copy my previous project anyway
it's just designed to be ultimate user friendly at the cost of patching a million things for no reason
same biob
like there's so many hacks that use rhr baserom so they have speed oscillation patched despite not having a reason to patch it. which makes vanilla flying feel really awkward
i mostly just re-use the folder layout and some scripts from it the rest i just delete and set up from scratch anyway
mhm
I like the one in breaking smw ^^
breaking smw has a walljump patch?
You can wall clip, but if you try to wall jump, then you can't wall clip.
ah
so the opposite of my modified walljump patch
which allows wall jumps but not wall clips
I think it's just one wall in one room.
It's a custom block, not a patch per se.
I found out the peach sprite has a description in lunar magic and it's kinda funny
The way she appears after bowser
That line is just funny to me considering what she looks like
Is she having a bad hair day?
"using this sprite is not recommended" could be added to most sprites.
shells? nah. coin snakes? nobody likes them.
invisible solid block?
invisible warp hole?
Coin snakes are fun when you put two coin snake blocks in the same level. Totally vanilla
why is there a coin snake in this anyway
vanilla or not, you just ignore both of them
Biob it's not a coin snake
right, it's a directional coins sprite
I'm telling you it's not a coin snake
Is that the new meta, gaslighting biob?
Biob it's not a spring board.
Yes, it's not a coin snake
No, yes it is.
watch it be patched to be a custom sprite or something
I'm not lying, it's not a coin snake
It's multiple coin snakes
well
ah I though we were talking about the top one Kapp
good game
just the animation
gl

it's okay, this puzzle has more than 3 screens so it's expected to be more difficult

they don't seem cooperative
i am amused
found it

the best thing is i was also just thinking about scrolling to manipulate the spawn first
I was thinking about spawning them from below the level
i noticed there's nothing in the glitch list about duplicating blocks with a tongue glitched shell
that's something to add i guess lol
First try

it is how it is
oh yeah i love that glitch lol
which is funny because i completely forgot it existed
i like how this has turned from "oh no timer" to "hf messes with coin blocks until time's almost up"

but like, if you get there you wouldn't need to anymore
no map16 edits right?
does growing yoshi in 33 help somehow
idk!

but the camera doesn't scroll

sure you can

huh, didn't expect that to work but i guess that makes sense

up seems not great

would probably be easier before the block was hit

also it has a lot of good tools

yes it does
idk if they have the same capabilities though
*me, getting 60 fps even when fast forwarding*:
I guess it's better for rta and light tools

so basically i'm stuck on windows
the mesen2 debugger is very good though
also i was thinking of throwing the shell up then hitting the block so it's up there instead
oh well, that works

and the mesen developer is MIA so I can't expect any improvements for it

being able to load symbols is also very useful
